author: claude
content: feat/dynamic-ci-test-durations-v2 #1155: RESOLVED (1 conflict) — rebased -b 3 commits onto master 315e6672. Conflict in .gitignore: master added a 'HATER.md' code-review-scratch ignore at the same spot the branch adds the pytest-split generated-file ignores (.test_durations_cached / .test_durations_group_*). mergiraf couldn't resolve (.gitignore is line-based, not in its AST set); resolved manually keeping BOTH blocks (intent unambiguous, additive). VERIFY: no markers remain; jj-precommit GREEN (isort/black/mypy/actionlint); pytest --collect-only clean (142 tests). new tip 29de670c; MERGEABLE. NOTE: tracking the remote bookmark surfaced the pre-rebase origin head as a divergence; set the bookmark to the clean rebased tip and pushed (sideways move). AMBIGUITY (a) CONFIRMED: #1155 is the 'v2' of #1151 — same feature (CI dynamic test durations for pytest-split), same touched files (run-tests.yaml, scripts/ci.sh, test/conftest.py) PLUS this branch adds the .gitignore entries and the CI-env-var gating that #1151 lacks. v2 is strictly the more complete superset. needs-human: #1151 is very likely superseded by #1155 — close #1151 (keep #1155)?
